emails.subject: Cinergy Guaranty
emails.body: Cinergy Guaranty Brant, Attached are the form of the JV Cinergy Guaranties. I will route the ENA for signature. Please note Section 2. I made these JV guaranties secondary to the Bridgeline Guaranty. Is March 1, 2000, the correct effective date for these.

emails.subject: FW: Cinergy Guaranty
emails.body: FW: Cinergy Guaranty Gerald, March 1 is the correct effective date. Please route the ENA gty for signature. thanks for your help. Trevor, Please forward the TEPI gty for signature. Thanks brant To: Reves, Brant
